document.title: Aspire Orchestration
document.summary: The platform uses .NET Aspire 13.1.2 to orchestrate all local services, containers, and dependencies.
document.implementation: AppHost project registers Ollama, RagFlow, Loki, Grafana, Temporal, Cassandra, NATS, Kafka as containers. Application projects (OpenClaw.Web, Admin.Api, Admin.Web, Gateway.Api, Demo.Pipeline) are registered with environment bindings.

document.title: Ack/Nack Notification Loopback
document.summary: Every integration implements atomic notification semantics: all-or-nothing. On success, publish Ack. On failure, publish Nack with saga compensation.
document.implementation: AtomicPipelineWorkflow in Workflow.Temporal. SagaCompensationActivities handle rollback on Nack. Downstream systems subscribe to Ack/Nack queues.
document.tags: ack nack atomic saga compensation rollback

document.title: Zero Message Loss
document.summary: Every accepted message is either delivered or routed to DLQ. No silent drops. Survives restarts and outages.
document.implementation: Kafka durable persistence + Temporal workflow durability + NATS JetStream file storage + DLQ fallback for all failed messages.

document.title: Multi-Tenancy
document.summary: The platform supports millions of tenants with lightweight topic/subject isolation per tenant.
document.implementation: MultiTenancy project with ITenantResolver. MultiTenancy.Onboarding for automated tenant provisioning. NATS subjects and Kafka topics partitioned by tenant.

document.title: Observability Stack
document.summary: Full observability with distributed tracing, metrics, and centralized logging.
document.implementation: OpenTelemetry SDK for traces and metrics. Loki for log aggregation. Grafana dashboards. Prometheus metrics endpoint.

document.title: Security Architecture
document.summary: JWT authentication, API key management, secrets management, and transport encryption.
document.implementation: Security project with JWT validation. Security.Secrets for secret storage. Admin.Api uses API key authentication. TLS for all broker connections.

document.title: Disaster Recovery
document.summary: DR drills, region failover, and recovery testing capabilities.
document.implementation: DisasterRecovery project with drill execution, history tracking, and region failover simulation. Admin.Web DR page for drill management.

document.title: Performance Profiling
document.summary: Runtime performance profiling with snapshot capture and GC diagnostics.
document.implementation: Performance.Profiling project with snapshot capture, GC collection triggers, and profiling data export.

document.title: Rule Engine
document.summary: Configurable rule evaluation for message routing and transformation decisions.
document.implementation: RuleEngine project with rule definitions, evaluation engine, and integration with routing/transform pipelines.

document.title: Event Sourcing
document.summary: Store state changes as a sequence of events rather than current state.
document.implementation: EventSourcing project with event store, snapshot support, and event replay for state reconstruction.

document.title: Self-Hosted RAG System
document.summary: Self-hosted Retrieval-Augmented Generation using RagFlow + Ollama for platform documentation context.
document.implementation: AI.RagFlow service interfaces with RagFlow API. AI.Ollama provides LLM capabilities. AI.RagKnowledge stores XML-based knowledge documents for indexing.
